ar.email.empty: Nothing new in your community for now. We'll keep you posted.
ar.email.footer: You're receiving this because you opted into the {{community}} civic digest. You can change cadence or opt out at any time.
ar.email.intro_daily: Here's what's new in your community today — {{count}} update(s) selected for you based on your sub-region and interests.
ar.empty_state: Nothing new in the last 30 days. Check back soon, or update your preferences below to broaden the feed.
ar.error_loading: Couldn't load your digest. Please try again.
ar.intro_body: A personalised feed of announcements, projects, events, services and alerts in your community — filtered by your sub-region, language and interests.
ar.prefs_cadence_off: Off — don't send me a digest
ar.prefs_save_error: Couldn't save your preferences. Please try again.
ar.prefs_sub_region_help: Leave blank to use the sub-region on your profile.
ar.push.title: Your civic digest is ready
ar.transparency.global_note: Items are ranked by relevance to your sub-region, interests, and recent activity. Tap 'Why?' on any item for details.
